subcodes.first_line: O Beloved of My heart! Upon Thee be the glory of My Lord, My Sovereign and My Master. At every moment, from all directions, the signs of manifestation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محبوب فوادی علیک بهاء مولائی و سلطانی و مالکی در هر حین از جمیع جهات آثار ظهور
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
